revision.text: {{Navbox with columns |name = Footer ISO 639 |state = {{{state|uncollapsed}}} |listclass = plainlist |colstyle = text-align:center; padding:0.5em 1.0em |colwidth = auto |title = [[ISO 639]] |col1 = *[[ISO 639|ISO 639:2023]] *— *standard |col2 = *[[ISO 639-1|Set 1]] *[[List of ISO 639-1 codes|list of codes]] *languages |col3 = *[[ISO 639-2|Set 2]] *[[List of ISO 639-2 codes|list of codes]] *languages |col4 = *[[ISO 639-3|Set 3]] *[[List of ISO 639-3 codes|list of codes]] *([[ISO 639 macrolanguage|macrolanguage codes]]) |col5 = *[[ISO 639-5|Set 5]] *[[List of ISO 639-5 codes|list of codes]] *families/groups |col6 = *[[ISO 639-6]] (defunct) *[[List of ISO 639-6 codes|list of codes]] *variants }}<noinclude> {{documentation}} </noinclude>

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Footer_ISO_639 here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Footer_ISO_639 for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{Navbox with columns |name = Footer ISO 639 |state = {{{state|uncollapsed}}} |listclass = plainlist |colstyle = text-align:center; padding:0.5em 1.0em |colwidth = auto |title = [[:en:ISO 639|ISO 639]] |col1 = *[[:en:ISO 639|ISO 639:2023]] *— *standard |col2 = *[[:en:ISO 639-1|Set 1]] *[[:en:en:List of ISO 639-1 codes|list of codes]] *languages |col3 = *[[:en:ISO 639-2|Set 2]] *[[:en:en:List of ISO 639-2 codes|list of codes]] *languages |col4 = *[[:en:ISO 639-3|Set 3]] *[[:en:List of ISO 639-3 codes|list of codes]] *([[:en:ISO 639 macrolanguage|macrolanguage codes]]) |col5 = *[[:en:ISO 639-5|Set 5]] *[[:en:List of ISO 639-5 codes|list of codes]] *families/groups |col6 = *[[:en:ISO 639-6|ISO 639-6]] (defunct) *[[:en:List of ISO 639-6 codes|list of codes]] *variants }}<noinclude> {{documentation}}
